title: Hittites
description: Test your knowledge of the Hittite empire!

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Hittites were an ancient Anatolian people. What is the modern-day country where Anatolia was?** 

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: This modern-day country is between Eastern Europe and Western Asia.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How did the discovery of ironworking and the creation of iron artifacts help the Hittites?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Iron weapons were more efficient than bronze weapons, giving the Hittites an advantage in battle
None of the Hittites’ trading partners were interested in acquiring iron, so the Hittites could keep these artifacts all to themselves
Iron storage containers were more effective at sealing and keeping food fresh than bronze ones

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Hittites’ use of _cuneiform_ writing suggests that**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Egyptians used hieroglyphs for writing, not cuneiform.

choices.content: they most likely had some connection, either direct or indirect, with Mesopotamian empires
they most likely had some connection, either direct or indirect, with Egyptian empires
they may have developed writing independently from other civilizations

assessment_items.question_content:
**The outcome of the _Battle of Kadesh_ between the Hittites and the Egyptians was that**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The Egyptians did not have superior technological resources than the Hittites.

choices.content: the two empires were evenly matched in military technology, which led to a draw; each claimed they had won
the Egyptians decided to be lenient with the Hittites, who did not have equal technological resources, and formed a peace treaty
the Egyptian military decided to incorporate iron weapons into their arsenal and began trading with the Hittites

assessment_items.question_content:
**The _Treaty of Kadesh_, agreed between the Egyptians and the Hittites, was the world’s first known peace treaty. One thing it illustrated was**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The Egyptians and Hittites were some of the most powerful states at this time.

choices.content: how little political power ancient leaders possessed
the military weakness of the Egyptians and Hittites
the ability of an empire’s leaders to decide the fates of its citizens
